name: Sunny [Remake]
description:
Your dearest friend, a cute and loveable puppy.
Though, you wish he were more than your friend.
Maybe you can make that wish come true?

Can be SFW or NSFW, your choice.

Artist of PFP and image below: Saku1saya (@Sakusaya2003)
Character originates from Poppy Playtime.
